title: Foaster.ai (YC P26)
full_text:
Foaster | Your AI transformation partner
Solutions
AI Transformation Assessment
Continuous AI Transformation
Enterprise Deployment
How it works
Case study
Resources
Blog
Research
About
Book a call
Backed by
Your AI Transformation
Partner.
Foaster maps how your company really works, identifies where AI should change it, and helps you make it happen.
Book a Demo
Explore Our Approach
Our method
AI agents for scale and depth. Human experts for judgment and implementation.
Interviews
AI agents conduct parallel, 30-minute interviews across your entire organization to capture every workflow, manual task, and tool usage that defines how work actually gets done.
Map
We build a granular map of your operations, visualizing how work flows between people and identifying every operational friction, bottleneck, and inefficiency.
Roadmap
A personalized transformation roadmap tailored to your specific operations and business goals, including impact analysis, technical feasibility, and implementation timelines.
Transform
Agents personally upskill every employee and track adoption monthly, while our human experts provide guidance each month and FDEs step in when implementation is needed.
Learn More
AI transformation starts when the company can finally see itself.
Our solutions
AI Transformation Assessment
A one-time deep diagnostic to know exactly where AI creates the most value.
Learn more →
Continuous AI Transformation
Ongoing support to drive adoption, upskill teams, and keep transformation on track.
Learn more →
Enterprise Deployment
A dedicated team of Forward Deployed Engineers to build and scale custom AI solutions.
Learn more →
FAQ
How is this different from hiring a consulting firm?
Consultants interview a handful of leaders and give you a deck. We interview your entire organization through AI, map how things actually work, and stay with you to make sure the transformation happens. It's faster, deeper, and built for real change.
What do the AI interviews look like for my teams?
Each employee has a private 30-minute conversation with an AI agent about their daily work, tools, bottlenecks, and ideas. No prep needed on their side. It's simple, confidential, and people are often more open than they'd be with a human consultant.
How fast can we expect results?
The first Assessment takes about 10 days. We run all interviews in parallel, then deliver a full operational map and a prioritized transformation roadmap, validated by a dedicated human expert. You get clarity fast.
How do you upskill our employees on AI?
Every week, each employee receives a personalized briefing: relevant AI tips, industry news, and a short presentation tailored to their exact role and daily tasks. Because we know what each person actually does, the content is immediately actionable. That's how you make transformation stick.
Is this adapted to our company size?
Yes. We work with companies from 50 employees to large enterprises. The scope, format, and pricing are adapted to your reality. Every organization faces different challenges, and the engagement reflects that.
What about data security?
We sign NDAs and DPAs before any engagement. All data is encrypted, access is strictly controlled, and nothing is shared externally. Interview responses are anonymized in deliverables unless explicitly agreed otherwise.
How much does it cost?
Pricing depends on the plan you choose and the size of your organization. As a benchmark, Foaster is typically 3 to 5x less expensive than traditional consulting — with broader coverage and faster delivery.
Begin your AI transformation.
Book a call with our founders. They'll take the time to understand your needs and how Foaster can help.
×
Get started
Continuous AI Transformation

Pick a time that works for you.
